rulings.Case Title: MATTHEW HARTMAN VS. RUCHIRA KARAMCHANDANI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Resonses To Form Interrogatories, Set Two, Number 15.1 And Verifications For Supplemental Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One From Defendants; Request For Sanctions Against Defendants And Their Attorney Of Record Ian Fraser-Thomson In The Amount Of $973.05
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 10, 2018, Line 3. PLAINTIFF MATTHEW HARTMAN'S Motion To Compel Further Resonses To Form Interrogatories, Set Two, Number 15.1 And Verifications For Supplemental Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One From Defendants; Request For Sanctions Against Defendants And Their Attorney Of Record Ian Fraser-Thomson In The Amount Of $973.05. GRANTED to compel further responses to interrogatory 15.1 as to affirmative defenses 10-20, 22-33, 37-39, 41-43 unless properly withdrawn. Sanctions granted in the amount of $500. Complete verified responses to be provided within 3 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/ACM)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 10, 2018, Line 4. PLAINTIFF OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Sustaining Sunset Scavenger Company's Demurrer To Plaintiff's Second Amended Complaint. Continued to May 15, 2018 to be heard by the Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay. =(501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: BLANCA MARTINEZ ET AL VS. PRONAY SAHA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 10, 2018, Line 5. DEFENDANTS PRONAY SAHA, KAREN SAHA'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged. Defendants fail to cite any authority for the proposition that a motion to strike is a proper motion to challenge the sufficiency of a cause of action. Additionally, Defendants' notice of motion fails to comply with CRC 3.1112. No reply filed. =(501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: 222 KEARNY PROPERTY, LP VS. STOCKWELL, HARRIS, WOOLVERTON & HELPHRY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 10, 2018, Line 6. PLAINTIFF 222 KEARNY PROPEERTY, LP'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment. GRANTED for an amount requested excluding $38,336.14 (claimed payments for October and November 2008); $70,270 Line of Credit payment and applicable reduction in accrued interest. Moving party sustained its burden under CCP 484.090. Moving party to prepare order indicating the amount to be attached in accordance with this ruling. =(501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SHIRLEY TAYLOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 10, 2018, Line 12. DEFENDANT SHIRLEY TAYLOR'S Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment. GRANTED. Defendant sustained her burden under CCP 473.5. Plaintiff filed an opposition on the merits. Defendant shall file and serve answer no later than April 11, 2018. =(501/ACM)
